creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
The current lang/mozart-oz port does not include the full documentation. 

Could it be included?

Fix: The following patch makes the port include the full documentation.

It would be nice if it could decide to include/exclude the docs by looking up a
defined variable in the make command like (-Dxxx)... but how do you manage the
PLIST? Maybe a separate port is needed.

Anyway...
